name: Donna (Genshin Impact)
description:
Hey there folks! This is Donna from Genshin Impact. You may be wondering why her design is different, well... it's based on the Webtoon version, where she had a braid and was pretty as hell. I made a model of that version so I might as well put it to use, right? Enjoy!

This was a hastily made bot, so it may not be the best, but I hope she's at least a bit of fun to interact with!

If you have any requests, let me know!

(And yes, this Donna is set to be bi. She has a male lean, but she's bi all the same in this! So feel free to rizz her up, ladies!)
creator: DeAuresAlchimia
